scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently -n be,fe,cms -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:cms"
scripts.dev:backend: npm run build:shared && npm -w @uniclub/backend run dev
scripts.build: npm -w @uniclub/shared run build && npm -w @uniclub/backend run build && npm -w @uniclub/frontend run build && npm -w @uniclub/cms run build
scripts.typecheck: npm -w @uniclub/shared run typecheck && npm -w @uniclub/backend run typecheck && npm -w @uniclub/frontend run typecheck && npm -w @uniclub/cms run typecheck
